title: NIO Analyst Ratings and Price Targets
text: Analyst consensus for NIO shows mixed sentiment with current month receiving 4 Buy ratings, 5 Hold ratings, and 1 Sell rating. Average price target ranges from lows of $4.04 to highs of $9.45. Most recent price target from HSBC on March 13, 2026 sets target at $6.80 expecting 7% upside over 12 months. Consensus appears cautiously positive despite divided opinion reflected in hold and sell ratings. Range of price targets indicates significant variation depending on analyst perspective and timeframe assumptions. Bulls cite investment from existing shareholders strengthening cash reserves, strong 40% premium EV market position, and significant growth expectations from ONVO and Firefly brands. Bears remain cautious on long-term profitability given high expenses and rising competition potentially forcing price reductions hurting margins.
